_publications._publicationTitle: Modelling neurofibromatosis type 1 tibial dysplasia and its treatment with lovastatin.

_contextSnippet: This was paralleled by an increased serum D-PYD in Nf1Prx1 animals, which was only slightly reduced by lovastatin treatment (control 2.5 ± 0.39 nMol/l; Nf1Prx1 3.95 ± 0.71 nMol/l; Nf1Prx1 +lovastatin 3.49 ± 0.83
details: Lovastatin treatment slightly reduced serum D-PYD from 3.95 ± 0.71 nMol/l to 3.49 ± 0.83 nMol/l
